description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles, giving it a traditional countryside appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally laid wooden planks, framed by darker, rough-hewn timber beams at the corners and around openings. The front facade features a single rectangular window with a simple wooden frame and a doorway set to the left, both outlined by the same dark timber. The roof has a slight overhang and is supported by visible crossbeams at the gable ends, adding to the structural authenticity. The cabin's proportions are compact, with a single main room implied by the window and door arrangement. The overall look is weathered yet sturdy, suitable for a rural or forested urban edge setting.
description: A compact rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof of reddish-brown shingles, featuring a single window and a side door framed by dark timber beams.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide gable roof, horizontally planked wooden wall, and dark timber framing, but no visible openings.
description_view_1: The left gable end reveals the roof's overhang, exposed crossbeams, and the solid wooden wall without windows or doors.
description_view_2: The main facade displays a rectangular window and a door on the left, both framed by dark timber, with the shingled roof above.
description_view_3: The right gable end mirrors the left, showing the roof's overhang, crossbeams, and a solid wooden wall.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in reddish-brown shingles, supported by visible crossbeams at the gable ends
attribute_window_arrangement: one medium-sized rectangular window on the front facade, positioned to the right of the door, framed in dark timber, with no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: one exterior door on the front facade, offset to the left side, framed by dark timber and adjacent to the window
